qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_tipo_vehiculo as oi_tipo_vehiculo, t0.c_tipo_vehiculo as c_tipo_vehiculo, t0.d_tipo_vehiculo as d_tipo_vehiculo, SEC.policy, t0.c_tipo_vehiculo as CODE, t0.d_tipo_vehiculo as TEXT FROM CCO06_TIPOS_VEHICULO as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Control_Contratistas.Tipo_Vehiculo.TIPO_VEHICULO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_tipo_vehiculo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_tipo_vehiculo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_tipo_vehiculo as oi_tipo_vehiculo, SEC.policy FROM CCO06_TIPOS_VEHICULO as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Control_Contratistas.Tipo_Vehiculo.TIPO_VEHICULO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_tipo_vehiculo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_tipo_vehiculo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Control_Contratistas.Tipo_Vehiculo.TIPO_VEHICULO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Control_Contratistas.Tipo_Vehiculo.TIPO_VEHICULO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(CCO06_TIPOS_VEHICULO.oi_tipo_vehiculo) as CNT from CCO06_TIPOS_VEHICULO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and CCO06_TIPOS_VEHICULO.oi_tipo_vehiculo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(CCO06_TIPOS_VEHICULO.d_tipo_vehiculo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(CCO06_TIPOS_VEHICULO.c_tipo_vehiculo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
